items.title: GELU as input scaled by normal CDF
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  x["input x"] --> phi["Phi x: normal CDF"]
  x --> mul["multiply"]
  phi --> mul
  mul --> out["GELU x = x * Phi x"]
items.caption: GELU multiplies the raw input by Φ(x), the probability a standard normal draw falls at or below x.

items.title: Transformer FFN with GELU
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  h["hidden states"] --> up["Linear up-project"]
  up --> gelu["GELU"]
  gelu --> down["Linear down-project"]
  down --> res["residual add"]
  h --> res
items.caption: In BERT-style encoders, GELU sits between the two linear layers of the feed-forward sublayer inside each Transformer block.
